description:
Syntax highlighting runs on every token append during streaming, invoking expensive AST traversal and highlight passes at 10–30 Hz. This causes measurable jank on mid-tier hardware.

**Fix:** Add a `syntaxHighlight?: boolean` prop to the `<Markdown>` molecule (default `true` for backward compat). When `false`, code blocks render in plain monospace using Tailwind typography tokens. When `true` (i.e. `isComplete === true`), the full highlight pipeline runs once.

**Files to modify:**
- `packages/ui/src/molecules/Markdown/Markdown.tsx` — add `syntaxHighlight?: boolean` prop
- `packages/ui/src/molecules/Markdown/CodeBlock.tsx` — conditionally apply highlight pass
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/MessageBubble.tsx` — pass `syntaxHighlight={isComplete}`
- `apps/ava/src/components/chat/StreamingMessage.tsx` — pass `syntaxHighlight={isComplete}` if separate

**Acceptance criteria:**
- 0 highlight-related long tasks (>16ms) during streaming of a 500-token message with a code block
- Full highlighting renders within 100ms after `isComplete` fires
- Existing `<Markdown>` usages without `syntaxHighlight` retain full highlighting (backward compat default)
- Build passes, all tests pass

**Complexity:** medium
title: Gate syntax highlighting behind isComplete flag
